channel.title: Astronomer of the Day
channel.description: RSS feed of the astronomer of the day.

item.title: Meghnad Saha
item.description: Meghnad Saha (6 October 1893 – 16 February 1956) was an Indian astrophysicist and politician who helped devise the theory of thermal ionisation. His Saha ionisation equation allowed astronomers to accurately relate the spectral classes of stars to their actual temperatures.
